steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage contrasts obligatory migration (diadromous fish) with salt tolerance without migration (euryhaline fish). The word “why” signals the blank must express the distinction this creates.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the winner
steps.content: ”Demarcated from” means marked off or separated as distinct—exactly what distinguishes obligatory migrators from tolerant non-migrators. The others suggest origin, transformation, or confusion. That matches choice A — A is correct.
